title: From #general
headline: Team, I’m happy to share that the merger of AppGrowth Inc. into BidMachine, Inc....
quote: Team, I’m happy to share that the merger of AppGrowth Inc. into BidMachine, Inc. officially closed on April 6, filed and accepted by the State of Delaware. What happened: Until now, our mediation, exchange, and DSP capabilities lived across separate legal entities — Appodeal, BidMachine, and AppGrow
author: Pavel Golubev
